title: acaena platyacantha
intro: Acaena platyacantha, also known as the silver button, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to New Zealand. The leaves and stems of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acaena platyacantha include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use should be limited to small doses due to potential toxicity.
